content:
<[[RMONOBON]]># [[NAME]]

Email: [[EMAIL]]

## Summary
Team Lead Digital Analytics with strong experience in building and scaling analytics teams, managing enterprise-level tracking infrastructures, and delivering data-driven insights using the Google Stack.

## Professional Experience

### Lead Digital Analytics | Company A
Jan 2022 – Present

- Led digital analytics function and owned end-to-end tracking and reporting setup
- Managed a team of 4 digital analysts
- Worked extensively with Google Stack: GA4, GTM, BigQuery, Looker Studio, Google Cloud
- Built reporting frameworks for marketing and product performance
- Coordinated analytics delivery across multiple business units

### Senior Digital Analyst | Company B
Jun 2019 – Dec 2021

- Developed GA4 tracking implementations and event structures
- Used GTM for tag management and deployment
- Built dashboards in Looker Studio for marketing performance tracking
- Worked with BigQuery for data extraction and analysis</[[RMONOBON]]>
